Functions and utilities for managing notifications, alerts, and Do Not Disturb settings in Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[ancs](ancs/README.md)**: Functions and utilities for managing ANCS notifications, app metadata, and phone call events in Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[action_chaining_window.c](action_chaining_window.c.md)**: Implements a window for action chaining with menu and status bar layers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[action_chaining_window.h](action_chaining_window.h.md)**: Defines functions and callbacks for managing action chaining windows in the Pebble firmware.
- **[alerts.c](alerts.c.md)**: Manages alert notifications with preferences for vibration, backlight, and do-not-disturb settings.
- **[alerts.h](alerts.h.md)**: Defines alert types and functions to manage user notifications, including analytics and vibration control.
- **[alerts_preferences.c](alerts_preferences.c.md)**: Manages alert preferences, including vibration settings and Do Not Disturb schedules, with migration from legacy settings.
- **[alerts_preferences.h](alerts_preferences.h.md)**: Defines enums for first use sources and mute bitfields, and a function to check and set first use completion.
- **[alerts_preferences_private.h](alerts_preferences_private.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing alert preferences and Do Not Disturb settings.
- **[alerts_private.h](alerts_private.h.md)**: Defines alert mask types and functions for managing alert settings and behaviors.
- **[do_not_disturb.c](do_not_disturb.c.md)**: Implements the Do Not Disturb functionality with manual and scheduled modes, including smart DND based on calendar events.
- **[do_not_disturb.h](do_not_disturb.h.md)**: Implements Do Not Disturb functionality with manual, smart, and scheduled activation modes.
- **[do_not_disturb_toggle.c](do_not_disturb_toggle.c.md)**: Implements a manual toggle for Do Not Disturb mode with UI prompts and logging.
- **[do_not_disturb_toggle.h](do_not_disturb_toggle.h.md)**: Function to push a "Do Not Disturb" toggle with an action prompt and optional exit reason.
- **[notification_constants.h](notification_constants.h.md)**: Defines notification preference database keys and a color constant for SMS replies.
- **[notification_storage.c](notification_storage.c.md)**: Manages notification storage, including initialization, locking, storing, retrieving, and compressing notifications.
- **[notification_storage.h](notification_storage.h.md)**: Functions for managing notification storage, including initialization, locking, storing, retrieving, and deleting notifications.
- **[notification_storage_private.h](notification_storage_private.h.md)**: Defines constants for notification storage file size and minimum increment size for compression.
- **[notification_types.h](notification_types.h.md)**: Defines notification types and structures for notifications and reminders.
- **[notifications.c](notifications.c.md)**: Handles notification actions, additions, removals, and timezone migrations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[notifications.h](notifications.h.md)**: Functions and data structures for handling notifications in the Pebble firmware.
